assessor_1_raw: The baseline tuning asymmetry (cross-val for LR vs. temporal validation for LSTM) is appropriate for each model type. The harmonized selection criterion (validation AUC-ROC) ensures fair comparison. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Course fail-rate proxy is computed from training data only and clamped to [0.01, 0.99] - appropriate regularization. Label finalization with 30-day grade appeal window ensures label quality. No flaw. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Temporal split by term with stratification by department and GPA quartile is rigorous. The stratification prevents distributional confounds at the split boundary. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Run 2: All 3 assessors independently reached defense_wins. Unanimous. Verdict: defense_wins.
